text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol.50 — 3D models & 5090s

50 PRs merged this week. We added a Z-axis, fired up a pool of RTX 5090s, and shipped Community Models Alpha.

───

→ 3D MODELS
Added 3D generation via Trellis 2 and Rodin 2.5. Because sometimes X and Y just aren't enough.

→ INFRASTRUCTURE & 5090s
We are now routing Flux traffic to a self-hosted Vast.ai pool of RTX 5090s, with a Fireworks fallback. Also shipped full OAuth 2.1 authorization-code grant with PKCE.

→ COMMUNITY MODELS ALPHA
The community text endpoints are live. We spent a good chunk of the week building guardrails: auto-deactivating unstable models and fixing errors so one bad node doesn't crash the neighborhood.

→ THE GREENHOUSE
14 new community apps added this week. Everything from AI soundscapes to games.

→ FIXES OF NOTE
1. Repaired WAV header size fields in the chat audio path.
2. Stopped nanobanana from clobbering reference images.
3. Dropped top_p when temperature is set for Bedrock Claude models.

Everything is open source. Come build something weird.
github.com/pollinations/pollinations

#OpenSource #AI #DevTools
